buttons.notAccessTitle: Aapko access karne ki anumati nahi hai
buttons.clearFiltersTooltip: Sabhi filters aur sorting reset karein
buttons.columnsTooltip: Table ke columns chunein, unka kram badlein aur chhupayen

home.all_stocked: Sabhi spool achhe se stock hain
home.recently_used: Haal hi mein istemal ki gayi
home.no_recent: Koi haal hi mein istemal ki gayi spool nahi
home.welcome: Aapke Spoolman instance mein swagat hai!
home.description: Lagta hai aapne abhi tak koi spool nahi jodi hai. Shuruaat karne mein madad ke liye <helpPageLink>Help page</helpPageLink> dekhein.
home.shopping_list_empty: Koi bhi filament apni kam-stock seema se neeche nahi hai.

usage.empty: Abhi tak koi filament istemal record nahi hua hai.

locations.no_locations_help: Is page par aap apni spools ko jagahon ke hisaab se organize kar sakte hain, shuruaat karne ke liye kuch spools jodein!

fields.title: Custom fields — {{name}}
fields.saved: Jagah ki fields save ho gayin
fields.save_error: Jagah ki fields save karne mein vifal

show.name: Naam
show.no_spools: Is jagah par koi spool nahi rakhi hai.

print.title: Jagah ke Labels print karein
print.description: Jin jagahon ke liye scan hone wale QR labels print karne hain unhe select karein.
print.none_selected: Koi jagah select nahi ki gayi

warnWhenUnsavedChanges: Kya aap sach mein jaana chahte hain? Aapke kuch badlav save nahi hue hain.

notifications.undoable: Undo karne ke liye aapke paas {{seconds}} second hain.
notifications.deleteError: {{resource}} delete karne mein error hua (status code: {{statusCode}})
notifications.editError: {{resource}} edit karne mein error hua (status code: {{statusCode}})

generic.title: Printing
generic.description: Manchaaha print layout paane ke liye neeche di gayi settings ko adjust karein. Dhyan rahe ki printers aur aapka OS apne khud ke margins aur scaling laga sakte hain, isliye sab sahi hone se pehle aapko kuch trial-and-error karna pad sakta hai. Asli labels par print karne se pehle ise saade kaagaz par test karein.
generic.helpMargin: Margins ko aapke label paper aur printer ke hisaab se set karna chahiye, inhe badalne se poore grid ka size badal jayega.
generic.helpPrinterMargin: Safe-Zone ko is hisaab se set karein ki aapka printer kaagaz ke kinare ke kitne paas tak print kar sakta hai, inhe badalne se poora grid prabhavit nahi hoga.
generic.deleteSettingsConfirm: Kya aap sach mein is preset ko delete karna chahte hain?
generic.saveAsImage: Image ke roop mein save karein

pageSizeMode.label: Page Size
pageSizeMode.tooltip: "Automatic" printer/browser ko page ki geometry khud chunne deta hai (default). "Label size se match karein" upar di gayi paper dimensions se ek explicit @page size nikaalta hai — roll/label printers (jaise Brother QL) ke liye iska istemal karein taaki labels sahi size aur orientation mein print hon. Chrome mein iska support sabse behtar hai.

generic.invalidGeometry: Label grid kaagaz par fit nahi ho raha hai
generic.invalidGeometryHelp: Margins aur spacing labels ke liye jagah nahi chhodte. Margins, spacing, columns ya rows kam karein — ya bada paper size chunein.
generic.contentClipped: Kuch label content kat raha hai
generic.contentClippedHelp: Kam se kam ek label ka content uske label ke andar fit nahi ho raha hai aur print hone par kat jayega. Text size kam karein, template chhota karein, ya kam columns/rows istemal karein taaki har label bada ho.

qrcode.title: Label Printing
qrcode.templateHelp: Spool object ki values ko text ke roop mein daalne ke liye {} ka istemal karein. Udaharan ke liye, {id} spool id se badal diya jayega, ya {filament.material} spool ke material se badal diya jayega. Agar koi value missing hai to use "?" se badal diya jayega. Ise hatane ke liye {} ka doosra set istemal kiya ja sakta hai. Iske alawa, agar value missing hai to {} ke sets ke beech ka saara text hata diya jayega. Udaharan ke liye, {Lot Nr: {lot_nr}} tabhi label par dikhega jab spool ka lot number ho. Text ko bold banane ke liye use double asterix ** se gherein. Sabhi uplabdh tags ki list dekhne ke liye button par click karein.

useHTTPUrl.label: QR code link
useHTTPUrl.tooltip: Proprietary link ka istemal karega jo sirf Spoolman ke scanning feature se scan karne par kaam karega (default). URL ya to settings mein diye gaye base URL ka istemal karta hai, ya set na hone par current page ke URL ka.

qrcode.templateHelpFilament: Filament object ki values ko text ke roop mein daalne ke liye {} ka istemal karein. Udaharan ke liye, {id} filament id se badal diya jayega, ya {vendor.name} vendor ke naam se badal diya jayega. Agar koi value missing hai to use "?" se badal diya jayega. Ise hatane ke liye {} ka doosra set istemal kiya ja sakta hai. Iske alawa, agar value missing hai to {} ke sets ke beech ka saara text hata diya jayega. Udaharan ke liye, {Article: {article_number}} tabhi label par dikhega jab filament ka article number ho. Text ko bold banane ke liye use double asterix ** se gherein. Sabhi uplabdh tags ki list dekhne ke liye button par click karein.

textColumns.label: Text Columns
textColumns.tooltip: Label ke text ko itne columns mein baantein. Kai chhoti lines wale patle labels ke liye kaam aata hai.

customPayload.label: Custom QR Payload
customPayload.tooltip: Scan hone wale QR content ko ek template se override karein (label wale hi tags). Default Spoolman payload istemal karne ke liye khaali chhodein. Custom value Spoolman ke andar tabhi scan hogi jab woh kisi pehchane gaye format se match kare (WEB+SPOOLMAN:S-{id} / F-{id} ya ek /spool/show/{id} URL).

qrErrorLevel.label: QR Error Correction
qrErrorLevel.tooltip: Zyada levels label par zyada damage/gandagi bardasht kar lete hain lekin QR code ko zyada ghana bana dete hain (chhota hone par scan karna mushkil). Default H (sabse zyada) hai.

qrPlacement.label: QR Placement
qrPlacement.tooltip: Label ke text ke hisaab se QR code kahan rahe. Use upar ya neeche rakhna lambe, patle labels ke liye sahi rehta hai.

showColorSwatch.label: Color Swatch print karein
showColorSwatch.tooltip: Label par filament ke rang ka ek chhota rangeen box print karein.

barcode1d.label: 1D Barcode
barcode1d.tooltip: Chaahein to QR payload ka 1D barcode QR code ke saath print karein, un scanners ke liye jo sirf linear barcodes padhte hain.

qrcode.tooltip: Select ki gayi rows ke liye labels print karein, ya agle page par items chunein

spoolSelect.title: Spools chunein
spoolSelect.description: Labels print karne ke liye spools chunein.
spoolSelect.noSpoolsSelected: Aapne koi spool select nahi kiya hai.
spoolSelect.reprintConfirmContent_one: {{count}} chuni gayi spool ka label pehle se print ho chuka hai. Use dobara print karein?
spoolSelect.reprintConfirmContent_other: {{count}} chuni gayi spools ke labels pehle se print ho chuke hain. Unhe dobara print karein?

filamentSelect.title: Filaments chunein
filamentSelect.description: Labels print karne ke liye filaments chunein.
filamentSelect.noFilamentsSelected: Aapne koi filament select nahi kiya hai.
filamentSelect.reprintConfirmContent_one: {{count}} chune gaye filament ka label pehle se print ho chuka hai. Use dobara print karein?
filamentSelect.reprintConfirmContent_other: {{count}} chune gaye filaments ke labels pehle se print ho chuke hain. Unhe dobara print karein?

scanner.title: QR Code Scanner
scanner.description: Spool ki jaankari dekhne ke liye ek Spoolman QR code scan karein.

error.notAllowed: Aapne camera ka access allow nahi kiya hai.
error.insecureContext: Yeh page HTTPS par serve nahi ho raha hai.
error.streamApiNotSupported: Browser MediaStream API ko support nahi karta.

fields_help.price: Poori spool ki keemat. Agar set nahi hai, to filament ki keemat maani jayegi.
fields_help.weight_to_use: Chunein ki kaunsi weight value enter karni hai. Measured weight tabhi uplabdh hai jab chune gaye filament ke liye spool weight set ho.
fields_help.used_weight: Spool se kitna filament istemal ho chuka hai. Nayi spool mein 0g istemal hona chahiye.
fields_help.remaining_weight: Spool par kitna filament bacha hai. Nayi spool ke liye yeh spool ke filament weight ke barabar hona chahiye.
fields_help.measured_weight: Filament aur spool ka kul vajan kitna hai.
fields_help.initial_weight: Spool par filament ka shuruaati vajan (net weight). Agar set nahi hai to filament object ka weight istemal hoga.
fields_help.spool_weight: Khaali spool ka vajan. Filament ya manufacturer ki value istemal karne ke liye khaali chhodein.
fields_help.location: Spool kahan rakhi hai, agar aapke paas spools rakhne ki kai jagahein hain.
fields_help.lot_nr: Manufacturer ka lot number. Kai spools istemal hone par print ka rang ek jaisa rakhne ke liye iska istemal kiya ja sakta hai.
fields_help.external_filament: Aapne external database se ek filament chuna hai. Jab aap yeh spool banayenge to ek filament object (aur shayad ek manufacturer object) apne aap ban jayega. Agar aapne is filament ke liye pehle se filament object banaya hai to isse duplicate filament objects ban sakte hain.
fields_help.printer: Woh printer jis par yeh spool abhi lagi hai. Apne printers Settings mein manage karein.
fields_help.diameter: Isi spool ke liye maapa gaya filament diameter, jo lambai ke calculations mein istemal hota hai. Filament ka diameter istemal karne ke liye khaali chhodein.
fields_help.color_hex: Isi spool ke liye vaikalpik rang, jo filament ke rang ko override karta hai. Filament ka rang istemal karne ke liye ise saaf kar dein.

form.adjust_filament_help: Yahan aap spool se seedhe filament joda ya ghata sakte hain. Positive value filament consume karegi, negative value use jodegi.
form.spool_updated: Jab se aapne yeh page khola hai, tab se is spool ko kisi aur ne/kisi cheez ne update kiya hai. Save karne par woh badlav overwrite ho jayenge!

messages.archive: Kya aap sach mein is spool ko archive karna chahte hain?
messages.update_error: Badlav save nahi ho paye. Kripya dobara koshish karein.
messages.reset_usage: Is spool ka istemal hua vajan zero par reset karein? Isse pehli/aakhri baar istemal ki dates saaf ho jayengi.

bulk.edit_help: Jis field ko har select ki gayi spool par badalna hai use tick karein. Bina tick wali fields jaisi hain waisi rahengi.
bulk.nothing_selected: Badalne ke liye kam se kam ek field tick karein.

weigh.title: Spools taulein
weigh.help: Ek spool dhoondhein, uska maap enter karein, phir bina band kiye agli spool taulne ke liye "Save karein aur agla" dabayen.
weigh.search_placeholder: ID, filament, lot number se khojein…
weigh.tooltip: Ek ke baad ek kai spools dobara taulein

view.grid_tooltip: Spools ko color tiles ke roop mein dekhein

sibling_spools.title: Is filament ki doosri spools
sibling_spools.tooltip: Is filament ki har spool ki list dekhein

usage_history.title: Istemal history
usage_history.empty: Abhi tak koi istemal record nahi hua hai.

weight_history.title: Vajan history
weight_history.chart_label: Samay ke saath maapa gaya vajan
weight_history.idle_gain: Maapon ke beech maapa gaya vajan {{grams}} g badh gaya — ho sakta hai spool ne nami sokh li ho. (Experimental)

fields_help.name: Filament ka naam, taaki isse usi manufacturer ke doosre filament types se alag pehchana ja sake. Ismein udaharan ke liye rang shamil hona chahiye.
fields_help.weight: Poori spool ka filament vajan (net weight). Ismein spool ka apna vajan shamil nahi hona chahiye, sirf filament ka. Yeh wahi hota hai jo aam taur par packaging par likha hota hai.
fields_help.spool_weight: Khaali spool ka vajan. Spool ka measured weight nikaalne ke liye istemal hota hai.
fields_help.multi_color_direction: Filaments do tarah se kai rang ke ho sakte hain: ya to coextrusion se, jaise dual-color filaments jinke multi-colors ek jaise rehte hain, ya longitudinal rang badlav se, jaise gradient filaments jinke rang spool ke saath-saath badalte hain.
fields_help.low_stock_threshold: Jab is filament ki sabhi spools ka kul bacha hua vajan itne grams se neeche chala jaye, to ise dobara order karne ke liye flag karein.
fields_help.reserve_count: Bina khuli extra spools ki sankhya jo aap paas rakhte hain — har ek ke liye spool banaye bina track hoti hain.
fields_help.settings_extruder_temp_range: Manufacturer ki recommended extruder temperature range (min–max). Vaikalpik hai, agar aapke paas sirf ek value hai to khaali chhodein.
fields_help.settings_bed_temp_range: Manufacturer ki recommended bed temperature range (min–max). Vaikalpik hai, agar aapke paas sirf ek value hai to khaali chhodein.

form.filament_updated: Jab se aapne yeh page khola hai, tab se is filament ko kisi aur ne/kisi cheez ne update kiya hai. Save karne par woh badlav overwrite ho jayenge!
form.import_external_description:
Filament creation form mein details apne aap bharne ke liye list mein se ek filament chunein. Isse form mein aapka bhara hua data overwrite ho jayega.

Zaroorat hone par, Ok click karne par ek Manufacturer object apne aap ban jayega.
form.import_3dfp_help: 3dfilamentprofiles.com se jaankari laakar apne aap bharein
form.import_3dfp_success: 3dfilamentprofiles.com se filament safaltapoorvak fetch kiya gaya
form.import_3dfp_error: 3dfilamentprofiles.com se filament data fetch karne mein vifal

swatch.title: 3D-printable swatch
swatch.description: Is filament ki label jaankari ke saath {{width}} × {{height}} mm ka printable sample card download karein. Card ka body isi filament se print hota hai; text aur QR code {{color}} mein ek-layer ki ubhri hui marking banate hain, jo filament ke rang se contrast ke liye chuni jaati hai.
swatch.print_hint: Poora card isi filament se print karein aur aakhri layer par filament ko {{color}} mein badlein, ya multi-color slicer (jaise Bambu Studio) mein embedded colors import karein. QR code dono tarah se scan hota rahega.
swatch.truncated_warning: Card par fit karne ke liye kuchh text chhota kiya gaya.

bulk.edit_help: Jis field ko har select kiye gaye filament par badalna hai use tick karein. Bina tick wali fields jaisi hain waisi rahengi.
bulk.nothing_selected: Badalne ke liye kam se kam ek field tick karein.

view.grid_tooltip: Filaments ko color tiles ke roop mein dekhein

messages.update_error: Badlav save nahi ho paye. Kripya dobara koshish karein.

fields_help.empty_spool_weight: Is manufacturer ki khaali spool ka vajan.

form.vendor_updated: Jab se aapne yeh page khola hai, tab se is manufacturer ko kisi aur ne/kisi cheez ne update kiya hai. Save karne par woh badlav overwrite ho jayenge!
form.duplicate_name_warning: Is naam ka ek manufacturer pehle se maujood hai.

resources.filament: Filament ke brands. Inmein naam, material, rang, diameter jaisi properties hoti hain.
resources.spool: Kisi khaas filament ki alag-alag physical spools.
resources.vendor: Woh companies jo filament banati hain.

help.description:
Shuruaat karne ke liye yahan kuch tips hain.

Spoolman 3 alag-alag prakaar ka data rakhta hai:

Database mein nayi spool jodne ke liye, pehle ek Filament object banayein. Uske baad, us khaas spool ke liye ek Spool object banayein. Agar aap baad mein usi filament ki aur spools lete hain, to bas aur Spool objects bana lein aur wahi Filament object dobara istemal karein.

Chaahein to, filament banane wali company ki jaankari track karne ke liye aap ek Manufacturer object bhi bana sakte hain.

Aap doosri 3D printer services ko Spoolman se jod sakte hain, jaise Moonraker, jo apne aap filament ke istemal par nazar rakhkar Spool objects update kar sakti hai. Ise set up karne ke liye Spoolman README dekhein.

base_url.label: Base URL
base_url.tooltip: QR codes jaisi features generate karte samay istemal hone wala base URL.

round_prices.label: Keematein round karein
round_prices.tooltip: Keematon ko nazdeeki poore number tak round karein.

unit_scaling.label: Badi units scale karein
unit_scaling.tooltip: List aur detail views mein bade vajan aur lambai ko raw grams/millimeters ke bajaye auto-scale karke dikhayen (jaise 1.5 kg, 64.37 m). Store ki gayi values aur API par koi asar nahi padta.

extra_fields.description:
Yahan aap apni entities mein extra custom fields jod sakte hain.

Ek baar field jud jaane par, aap uski key ya type nahi badal sakte, aur choice type fields ke liye aap na choices hata sakte hain na multi choice state badal sakte hain. Agar aap koi field hataate hain, to sabhi entities ka usse juda data delete ho jayega.

Key wahi hai jiske roop mein doosre programs data padhte/likhte hain, isliye agar aapka custom field kisi third-party program ke saath integrate hona hai, to use sahi set karein. Default value sirf naye items par lagoo hoti hai.

Extra fields ko table views mein dikhaya aur sort kiya ja sakta hai. Choice aur boolean fields wahan filter options bhi dete hain, aur sabhi extra field types khaali values ke liye filtering support karte hain.

Spool fields ke liye, "Filament se copy karein" enable karein taaki nayi spool banate samay usi key wali filament field se value apne aap le le (jab tak spool apni khud ki value na set kare).

Ek "Link" field har item ke liye ek chhoti value store karta hai (jaise article number) aur use Link URL template se clickable link bana deta hai — jahan value aani hai wahan {} rakhein, jaise https://www.amazon.com/dp/{}.
extra_fields.choices_missing_error: Aap choices hata nahi sakte. Yeh choices missing hain: {{choices}}
extra_fields.key_not_changed: Kripya key ko kisi aur cheez mein badlein.
extra_fields.delete_confirm_description: Isse yeh field aur sabhi entities ka isse juda saara data delete ho jayega.

default_style.label: Default swatch style
default_style.tooltip: 3D-printable filament swatch download karte samay pehle se chuna gaya style. Naye styles Spoolman mein client/src/utils/swatch/styles.ts par contribute kiye ja sakte hain.

swatch.preview_description: Do example filaments ke saath preview — text aur QR code apne aap kaale ya safed mein print hote hain, jo bhi filament ke rang se behtar contrast kare:

import_export.export_help: Apne manufacturers, filaments ya spools ko CSV ya JSON ke roop mein download karein. Spools ke saath manufacturer aur filament ka data shamil hota hai.
import_export.import_help: Export jaisi hi shape wali CSV ya JSON file upload karein. Poori file ek all-or-nothing transaction ke roop mein apply hoti hai; result ka preview dekhne ke liye pehle dry run istemal karein.
import_export.report_help: Apne maujooda stock ka printable summary kholein.
import_export.result: {{created}} banaye gaye, {{updated}} update kiye gaye, {{skipped}} skip kiye gaye.

threemf.title: Sliced 3MF project import karein
threemf.help: Bambu Studio ya OrcaSlicer se sliced .3mf upload karein — isse pata chalega ki print mein har filament kitna laga, use aapki spools se match kiya jayega, aur istemal ek hi step mein ghata diya jayega.
threemf.no_filaments: Is 3MF mein koi filament istemal nahi mila.
threemf.no_match: Koi matching spool nahi — ek chunein
threemf.applied: {{count}} spool(s) par istemal record kiya gaya.
threemf.applied_partial: {{ok}} spool(s) par istemal record kiya gaya; {{fail}} vifal rahe.

printers.description: Apne printers yahan manage karein. Ek baar kam se kam ek printer ho jaye, to aap spool ke create ya edit form se spool ko kisi printer ko assign kar sakte hain.
printers.delete_confirm: Printer "{{name}}" delete karein? Usse assign spools sirf unassign hongi, delete nahi.

custom_links.sidebar_description: Baayi sidebar mein apne khud ke links jodein, jaise apne printer ke Mainsail ya Fluidd page ka. Yeh naye tab mein khulte hain.
custom_links.spool_description: Har spool par custom action buttons jodein. URL mein spool ki fields curly braces mein daali ja sakti hain — {id}, {filament_id}, {location}, {lot_nr}, {comment} — jo har spool ke hisaab se bhar di jaati hain, isliye nfc2klipper ya Moonraker ke active-spool endpoint jaise tools bas ek click door rehte hain.
custom_links.name: Naam
custom_links.url_template_help: Jahan spool ID aani chahiye wahan {id} ka istemal karein, jaise http://moonraker.local/...?id={id}

calibration.title: Calibration
calibration.no_data: Abhi tak koi calibration data nahi hai.
calibration.no_recommended: Abhi tak koi recommended values set nahi hain.

fields.no_steps: Abhi tak koi step results record nahi hue hain.

step_form.recommended_hint: Yahan di gayi values spool page par recommended settings ke roop mein dikhti hain.

calibration.delete_session_confirm: Yeh calibration session aur iske sabhi step results delete karein?

wizard.title: Calibration Wizard
wizard.subtitle: OrcaSlicer calibration guide ko step by step follow karein. Aap koi bhi step chhod sakte hain aur baad mein resume kar sakte hain.
wizard.skip_finish_confirm: Is step ko save kiye bina session ko complete mark karein?
wizard.session_complete: Calibration session complete mark kiya gaya.

nfc.scan_description: Spool ki jaankari dekhne ke liye ek NFC tag scan karein.
nfc.encode_title: Spool ko NFC Tag par encode karein
nfc.no_match: Is tag ke liye koi matching spool nahi mila.
nfc.create_from_tag_description: Koi matching spool nahi mila. Aap neeche diye gaye tag data se ek nayi spool bana sakte hain.
nfc.create_error: Tag data se spool banane mein vifal.
nfc.unsupported: Is browser mein NFC support nahi hai.
nfc.browser_ndef_warning: Chetavani: Browser NFC writes NDEF format ka istemal karti hain. Is tarah likhe gaye tags TigerTag app dwara pehchane NAHI jayenge, jo pages 4-39 par raw binary ki apeksha karta hai. TigerTag-compatible writes ke liye Server mode ka istemal karein, ya kisi external NFC tool ke saath istemal ke liye Raw Binary download karein.
nfc.browser_write_success: TigerTag data NDEF ke zariye NFC tag par likha gaya.

error.not_supported: Is browser mein Web NFC support nahi hai. Connected reader ke saath Server mode ka istemal karein.
error.encode_failed: TigerTag data encode karne mein vifal.

nfc.bind_title: NFC Tag ko Spool se link karein
nfc.bind_description: Is spool se link karne ke liye ek maujooda NFC tag scan karein. Aage is tag ko scan karne par yeh spool apne aap select ho jayegi.
nfc.bind_confirm_description: Tag scan ho gaya. Neeche diya gaya tag data dekhein aur is spool se link karne ke liye confirm karein.
nfc.bind_success: Tag safaltapoorvak spool se link ho gaya!
nfc.bind_error: Tag ko spool se link karne mein vifal.
nfc.bind_no_tigertag: Is tag par koi TigerTag data nahi mila. Link karne ke liye sirf TigerTag format supported hai.
nfc.qidi_write_info: Qidi tags sirf material aur rang store karte hain. Tag ko sabse milte-julte Qidi material aur color codes ke saath likha jayega.

errorBoundary.title: Kuch galat ho gaya
errorBoundary.subTitle: Yeh page render nahi ho paya. Agar yeh view settings badalne ya share karne ke baad shuru hua hai, to unhe reset karne se aam taur par theek ho jata hai.
errorBoundary.reset: View settings reset karke reload karein

apiToken.title: API token zaroori hai
apiToken.help: Is Spoolman instance ke liye API token zaroori hai. Aage badhne ke liye use enter karein; yeh isi browser mein store hota hai.

users.title: User accounts
users.help: Login zaroori banane ke liye accounts banayein. Read-only users sab kuch dekh sakte hain lekin badlav nahi kar sakte. Pehla account hamesha administrator hota hai.
users.reset_password_help: Is user ke liye naya password enter karein.

colorFilter.title: Milte-julte rang se filter karein
colorFilter.help: Sirf woh items dikhayen jinka rang chune gaye rang se is tolerance ke andar ho.

scan.title: Scan
scan.nfc_hint: Is browser mein NFC scanning uplabdh nahi hai. Android Chrome istemal karein, ya ek server-side NFC reader connect karein.

move.scan_spool: Move karne ke liye ek spool scan karein.
move.scan_location: Spool #{{id}} select ki gayi. Ab jis jagah bhejni hai use scan karein.
move.load_error: Scan ki gayi jagah load karne mein vifal.

clear.recognized: Clear-spool code pehchana gaya. Spoolman mein koi active spool nahi hoti; use clear karna aapke printer ya Moonraker integration ka kaam hai.

barcode.unknown_content: Kisi bhi filament ka barcode {{code}} nahi hai. Ek filament banakar yeh barcode yaad rakhein?
barcode.lookup_error: Us barcode ki jaankari nahi mil payi.
